mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.platform_policies_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, title, policy_category, version_label, state_id, flow_id, effective_date, summary_text, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), COALESCE(p.title, p.name), COALESCE(p.policy_category, p.category), COALESCE(p.version_label, p.version_number), p.state_id, p.flow_id, COALESCE(p.effective_date, p.effective_from), p.summary_text, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM hm_compliance.platform_policies p

INSERT INTO hm_query.agreements_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, title, agreement_type, version_label, state_id, flow_id, effective_date, expiry_date, mandatory_acceptance, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT a.id, a.tenant, NOW(), COALESCE(a.title, a.name), a.agreement_type, COALESCE(a.version_label, a.version_number), a.state_id, a.flow_id, COALESCE(a.effective_date, a.effective_from), COALESCE(a.expiry_date, a.effective_until), COALESCE(a.mandatory_acceptance, a.requires_acceptance), a.created_time, a.last_modified_time FROM hm_compliance.agreements a

INSERT INTO hm_query.acceptances_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, agreement_title, user_id, user_type, accepted_at, acceptance_method, is_current, agreement_id ) SELECT aa.id, aa.tenant, NOW(), COALESCE(a.title, a.name), aa.user_id, aa.user_type, aa.accepted_at, aa.acceptance_method, aa.is_current, aa.agreement_id FROM hm_compliance.agreement_acceptances aa JOIN hm_compliance.agreements a ON aa.agreement_id = a.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.regulations_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, act_name, section, requirement_summary, jurisdiction, applicable_to, enforcement_date, category, is_active ) SELECT r.id, r.tenant, NOW(), r.act_name, r.section, r.requirement_summary, r.jurisdiction, r.applicable_to, r.enforcement_date, r.category, r.is_active FROM hm_compliance.regulations r
